summary_en: 120,000 shares (0.38% of shares outstanding) authorized for acquisition; ¥500M upper limit; execution window May 18–December 30, 2026; open-market method on Tokyo Stock Exchange.
translation_en_brief: On 15 May 2026, MOS Food Services' board of directors resolved to authorize a share buyback framework under Companies Act Article 165(2) and the company's articles of association. The authorization permits acquisition of up to 120,000 shares (0.38% of issued shares outstanding excluding treasury stock) for an aggregate amount not to exceed ¥500 million. Execution window runs from 18 May 2026 through 30 December 2026 via open-market purchases on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The company states the buyback supports its capital allocation policy balancing growth investment and shareholder returns. The disclosure notes that execution is discretionary—the company may acquire all, part, or none of the authorized shares depending on market conditions, financial position, share price, and capital requirements for M&A or organic growth.
